what_happened: Added build-validation job to pr-test.yml GitHub Actions workflow
why: No build job existed; needed to validate pnpm build passes on PRs
fix_applied: Added build-validation job after existing test job, before security-scan, following identical pattern (checkout, pnpm setup, node setup, frozen-lockfile install, build step) with same SHA-pinned action versions
pattern_to_remember: GitHub Actions jobs in this repo all use SHA-pinned actions: checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 (v4.2.2), pnpm/action-setup@a3252b7a1b56a178b52fdf4936d7adab69e4bdad (v4.1.0), setup-node@49933ea5288caeca8642d1e84afbd3f7d6820020 (v4.4.0). The DATABASE_URL placeholder postgresql://localhost:5432/placeholder is required for prisma postinstall during pnpm install --frozen-lockfile even when no live DB is needed.
